explanation: The command line is a direct match to the Sigma rule's detection criteria and will trigger the rule. It is provided as a true positive test case.
The Sigma rule includes detection for URLs containing '://run.mocky' or '://mockbin'. This command uses 'run.mocky.io' and will also trigger the rule.
Appending a query parameter to the URL does not change the detection criteria of the Sigma rule. The command still contains the 'mockbin.org' URL and will trigger the rule.
Adding a fragment to the URL does not affect the Sigma rule's detection logic. The command still contains the 'mockbin.org' URL and will trigger the rule.
